prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海交通大学在湖南省物理类最低录取位次分别为约687名、798名、803名、446名、497名。2021–2023年位次在687–803区间波动，2024年大幅跃升 至446名（创近年最佳），2025年回落至497名。近5年位次整体呈波动中前移趋势，2025年基准位次约497名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划：2021年85人，2022 –2023年各7人，2024年13人，2025年14人，2026年（招生计划文件）增至21人。2026年较2025年扩招7人（增幅50%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属于C9联盟、华东五校之一，综合实力稳居全国顶尖梯队。
4. 【声誉热度】2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿数量较多）及校园安全事件，但作为顶尖名校，负面舆情对报考热度的实际影响有限。抖音热度排名第 42位，评价为较热，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映考生关注度较高。历史投档异常方面，2021年曾出现投档线偏负面信号，但近年未见明显断档；上海交通 大学拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中A+学科包括：机械工程、材料科学与工程、生物学、计算机科学与技术、临床医学、口腔医学、工商管理、管理科学与工程、外国语言文学等， 学科实力极为雄厚，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等交大王牌工科专业均为 高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学为推荐，法学为分化观望。相关专业大类热度整体偏高，有利于维持报考热度。湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年（约32.0万人）增 加约2.7万人（增幅约8.4%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。省控线方面，2025年物理类本科批405分，较2024年422分下降，但省控线波动对顶尖高校位次影响有限；上海交通大学位于上海市，属于一线城市高校，对湖南省考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在湖南省物理类招生计划占比较小（2025年14人），属于跨省招生中的典型外省名校投 放模式，招生人数变化对位次影响较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次497名、2026年物理类招生计划大幅扩招50%（从14人增至21人）、湖南省物理类考生增加约8. 4%、学校顶尖层次与优势学科持续吸引高分考生、专业热度偏高等因素。经小幅修正后，预测2026年最低录取位次约62 6名，区间551–701名。扩招是影响位次的最关键因素，考生总数增加和学校强劲吸引力形成对冲，位次较2025年小幅后移。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Jiao Tong University in Hunan Province's Physics Category were approximately 687, 798, 803, 446, and 497 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 687 and 803 from 2021 to 2023, surged to 446 in 2024 (a recent best), and fell back to 497 in 2025. Over the past five years, rankings have shown a fluctuating but forward-moving trend, with a baseline ranking of about 497 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province: 85 in 2021, 7 each in 2022 and 2023, 13 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and increased to 21 in 2026 (per enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan expands by 7 students (a 50% increase), a significant expansion that will importantly impact the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings for many years (2021–2026). It is a member of the C9 League and one of the Five East China Universities, with comprehensive strength firmly in the top tier of the country.
4. [Reputation Heat] During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (a relatively high number of retractions) and campus safety incidents. However, as a top prestigious university, the actual impact of negative public opinion on application popularity is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd, rated as relatively hot, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high candidate attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a somewhat negative signal in the admission line in 2021, but no significant gaps have been seen in recent years. Shanghai Jiao Tong University has 28 A- or above disciplines, including A+ disciplines: Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc. Its disciplinary strength is extremely strong, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Analysis of major popularity for 2026 shows that Jiao Tong's flagship engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are recommended, while Law is differentiated and watched. The overall popularity of related major categories is relatively high, helping to maintain application heat. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 27,000 (approximately 8.4%) compared to 2025 (about 320,000). The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, but fluctuations in the control line have limited impact on top university rankings. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, which has a strong regional appeal to Hunan candidates. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province accounts for a small proportion (14 in 2025), typical of cross-provincial enrollment by prestigious universities from other provinces, making ranking changes sensitive to enrollment number variations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 497, the significant 50% expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (from 14 to 21), the approximately 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category candidates, the university's top-tier status and advantageous disciplines continuously attracting high-scoring candidates, and the high popularity of majors. After minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 626, with a range of 551–701. Expansion is the most critical factor affecting rankings, with the increase in total candidates and the university's strong appeal forming a counterbalance, causing the ranking to shift slightly backward compared to 2025.

- Robotics Engineering (Autonomous Intelligent Leading Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Dual Degree Program)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Xu Zuyao Honor Class)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Dual Degree Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (School of Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering Pilot Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 626, with a range of 551–701. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (551) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, IEEE Pilot Class, etc.); candidates near the 626 ranking should primarily target Tier 2 majors (Science Experimental Class, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprints; candidates near the upper limit of the range (701) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Economics and Management Experimental Class, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.), while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings. Shanghai Jiao Tong University has extremely balanced disciplinary strength, with A+ discipline support across all tiers. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海交通大学在湖南省历史类最低录取位次分别为约68名、69名、75名、76名、63名。近5年位次在63–76名区间窄幅波动，整体极为稳定，2025年位 次63名为近年最优。2025年基准位次约63名；该校在湖南省历史类招生计划：2021–2023年各1人，2024年6人，2025年2人，2026年（招生计划文件）2人。2026 年计划与2025年持平，均为2人，招生规模极小，位次对计划变化高度敏感。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名全国第4名，属于C9 联盟顶尖高校，综合实力和历史底蕴对文科/历史类考生同样具有极强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，但作为顶尖名校，负面舆情对报考热度影响 有限。抖音热度排名第42位，评价较热。历史类招生专业为法学试验班（涉外法治特班、含双学士学位项目），法学学科评估为A，专业吸引力强；上海交通大 学法学为A级学科，外国语言文学为A+学科，与历史类招生专业高度匹配。法学专业社会热度为推荐（偏热），涉外法治方向契合国家战略需求，对高分历史类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，法学为分化观望（推荐与劝退并存），但交大法学作为A级学科，叠加双学士学位项目和涉外法治特班，竞争力远超普通院 校法学专业。湖南省2026年历史类考生约18.7万人，较2025年（约14.25万人）增加约4.45万人（增幅约31.2%），考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧。省控线方面，2025年历史类 本科批446分，较2024年438分上升，但省控线波动对顶尖高校位次影响有限；上海交通大学位于上海市，一线城市区位优势明显。历史类招生仅2人，属于极小 规模招生，位次波动受个别高分考生报考决策影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次63名、2026年历史类招生计划持平（2人）、湖南省历史类考生大幅增加约31.2%、 法学专业热度偏高等因素。考虑到考生总数大幅增加导致竞争加剧，经小幅修正后，预测2026年最低录取位次约68名，区间18–118 名。考生总数大幅增加是推动位次后移的最关键因素，招生计划不变使得竞争烈度上升。

一档（最难进）

- 法学试验班（含双学士学位项目）（含法学-经济学双学士学位项目）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学在湖南省历史类仅招收法学试验班（2个方向各1人），招生名额极少。预测位次约68名，区间18–118名。位次在区间下限（18名）以内的考生录取把握极大；位次 在68名附近的考生有较大希望；位次在区间上限（118名）附近的考生可尝试冲刺。由于仅有一个专业大类（法学试验班），建议考生结合对法学专业的兴趣和职业规划做出选择 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Jiao Tong University in Hunan Province's History Category were approximately 68, 69, 75, 76, and 63 respectively. Over the past 5 years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 63–76 range, showing overall stability, with the 2025 ranking of 63 being the best in recent years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 63. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan: 1 person each year from 2021 to 2023, 6 persons in 2024, 2 persons in 2025, and 2 persons in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, both at 2 persons, with a very small enrollment scale, making rankings highly sensitive to plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 4th nationally by Soft Science, belonging to the C9 League of top universities. Its comprehensive strength and historical heritage strongly attract liberal arts/history category students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but as a top prestigious university, negative public opinion has limited impact on application popularity. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd, with relatively high evaluation. The History Category enrollment major is the Law Experimental Class (International Rule of Law Special Class, including dual degree programs). Law discipline is rated A, with strong professional appeal. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's Law is an A-level discipline, and Foreign Languages and Literature is an A+ discipline, highly matching the History Category enrollment major. The social popularity of the Law major is recommended (relatively hot), and the International Rule of Law direction aligns with national strategic needs, strongly attracting high-scoring History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that Law is in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see (both recommended and discouraged), but Jiao Tong University's Law, as an A-level discipline, combined with dual degree programs and the International Rule of Law Special Class, has competitiveness far exceeding ordinary university Law majors. In 2026, Hunan Province has approximately 187,000 History Category examinees, an increase of about 44,500 (approximately 31.2%) compared to 2025 (approximately 142,500), with a significant expansion in examinee scale and intensified competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score is 446 points, up from 438 points in 2024, but fluctuations in the provincial control line have limited impact on top university rankings. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, with obvious first-tier city location advantages. History Category enrollment is only 2 persons, an extremely small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations highly influenced by individual high-scoring examinees' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 63, the unchanged 2026 History Category enrollment plan (2 persons), the significant increase of approximately 31.2% in Hunan History Category examinees, and the relatively high popularity of the Law major, among other factors. Given the intensified competition due to the substantial increase in total examinees, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 68, with a range of 18–118. The significant increase in total examinees is the most critical factor pushing the ranking backward, while the unchanged enrollment plan raises the intensity of competition.

- Law Experimental Class (Including Dual Degree Programs) (Including Law-Economics Dual Degree Program).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University only enrolls the Law Experimental Class (2 directions, 1 person each) in Hunan Province's History Category, with very few admission slots. The predicted ranking is approximately 68, with a range of 18–118. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (18) have a very high chance of admission; candidates with rankings around 68 have a good chance; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (118) can try a sprint. Since there is only one major category (Law Experimental Class), it is recommended that candidates make their choice based on their interest in the Law major and career planning.
